title: Passive Voice Mastery Test
description: 1400 original multiple-choice passive voice questions for General English, VSTEP, IELTS, TOEIC, and Cambridge-style practice.
sourceNotes: Original questions generated from passive voice tense, agent, transformation, and formal-writing patterns; not copied from source materials.

questions.prompt: Choose the correct passive sentence. Focus: am/is/are + past participle. Context set 0001.
options: The report is checked every Monday.
The report are checked every Monday.
The report is check every Monday.
The report checked every Monday.
questions.answer: The report is checked every Monday.
questions.explanation: Use am, is, or are plus the past participle for present simple passive.
